text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! 🎉 You've been approved as a moderator. We're glad to have you!
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! 🎉 You've been approved as an event helper. Looking forward to your contributions!
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! 🎉 You've been approved as a member. Feel free to jump in and introduce yourself!
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! 🎉 You've been approved as a mentor. Your experience will be invaluable to our members!
